An action is a character's activity on their turn in the combat or other kinds of round.

A nonmagical iron or steel object within range that you can see overheats, and it gives off bright light in a 20-foot radius for the duration. Each creature within that light must succeed on a DC 14 Dexterity saving throw or take 2d8 fire damage. On a successful save, a creature takes half as much damage (1d8). The object also glows brightly and spreads the heat over its surface for the duration.
which take reaction, you in Hide, to damaged creature by a being that can you see. Range: 60 feet. Components: V.
An instantaneous spell harms, heals, creates, or alters a place, object, or creature instantaneously.
